title: VinFast Dashboard
disclaimer: Disclaimer: This software is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to VinFast Auto or its subsidiaries. It is provided "as is" for educational and personal use only.
tagline: A tool for enthusiasts, by enthusiasts.
mobileDescription: A community hobby project developed to provide deeper insights into your vehicle's data. We visualize raw telemetry from VinFast servers to show details often missing from the official app.
desktopIntro1: VinFast Dashboard is an open-source project initiated by members of
desktopIntro2: Our mission is to build a comprehensive tool that helps users visualize vehicle data more intuitively. By leveraging raw telemetry, we surface valuable insights—such as
desktopIntro3: —often not visible in the official app.
desktopIntro4: This is strictly a non-commercial, hobbyist initiative created purely out of passion for technology and the VinFast community.

features.deeperInsightsDesc: See what's under the hood with raw visualization.
features.realTimeDataDesc: Live updates for battery, charging, and climate status.
